purpose: Separate non-Techni pipeline memory and stage rules for independent freelance work.
ownership_rule: Only clearly non-Techni leads belong in this pipeline.

first_cycle_targets.success_metric: first independent income or two to three active conversations
first_cycle_targets.do_not_measure: perfect website, ERIS commercialization, or more architecture

qualification_rules: Lead must be clearly outside Techni-Drones ownership.
Lead should have a real monitoring, reporting, or biodiversity data problem.
Lead should be reachable through verified contact information before being marked verified.
If ownership is unclear, classify as ambiguous and stop.
stop_rules: Stop when a human says the lead belongs to Techni-Drones.
Pause when a legal, payment, or contract question appears and a human answer is needed.
notes: Do not pitch ERIS during first-cycle independent outreach.
Use sample-review offers to reduce friction before quoting.
Execution and proof matter more than expanding the system.
The normalized CRM supports drafting and prioritization, but human contact verification is still mandatory before any external send.
